catalog_content:
Item Name: Waffle Pantry® Italian Pearl Sugar, 16 oz (Zucchero Granella)
Bullet Point 1: Imported from Italy
Bullet Point 2: Perfect for baking delicious Italian panettone
Bullet Point 3: Perfect for baking delicious Italian colomba pasquale
Bullet Point 4: 100% beet sugar
Product Description: Our Italian pearl sugar, or Zucchero Granella, is made of beet sugar and is sourced from the region of Piedmont in Italy situated at the foot of the Alps. Zucchero Granella is a staple in traditional Italian cuisine. Its pure, clean taste and subtle sweetness make it perfect for sweetening desserts like cakes, pastries, and tiramisu. One of the most popular uses of Italian pearl sugar is in Panettone and Colomba Pasquale, a beloved Christmas and Easter cake shaped like a dove. Zucchero Granella is commonly added to the cake's rich, buttery dough to provide a subtle sweetness and caramelized flavor. Origin : Product of Italy Granularity: 5mm Packaging: 10 kg Whether you are a professional baker or a home cook, Italian pearl sugar is an essential ingredient to have in your pantry.
Value: 16.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium Italian specialty sugar with a focus on authentic regional sourcing and culinary use. Positioned as a high-quality baking ingredient, the packaging emphasizes its Italian origin and traditional applications. The 16 oz size and granularity specification suggest a mid-range price point for specialty baking supplies, justified by its imported status and niche culinary purpose.
